name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, payroll tax compliance issues cause late filings and potential penalties. We automate tax calculations and filings instead of manual calculations and filing by HR teams.
problem_solved: Difficulty in managing payroll tax compliance accurately and on time.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in managing payroll tax compliance accurately and on time.
